pi_items.source: task.json description specifies: 'Configure a new Prevention Rule in OSCAR EMR named Senior Weight Monitor'
task.json description specifies: 'trigger for all patients aged 65 and older'
task.json description specifies: 'have not had a weight recording in the last 12 months'
task.json description specifies duration unit as months ('12 months')
task.json description specifies: 'The alert text should mention Monitor for unexpected weight loss'
task.json description specifies rule is for 'weight recording' and the alert mentions 'weight loss'

privileged_info_summary: No real privileged information found. This task operates on synthetic benchmark data using demo credentials (oscardoc/oscar/PIN:1117) and seeded test patient data in an OSCAR EMR sandbox environment. The task creates a synthetic Prevention Rule configuration named 'Senior Weight Monitor' for patients aged 65 or older with no weight recordings in 12 months. All metadata values are correctly specified task configuration targets verified against the explicit task description.
